
Domicide is the [[triad]] of [[Seven Plagues|plagues]] in which [[Absurdity]], [[Angst]], and [[Alienation]] fall into. These sins are called as such because they were mostly addressed by Hellenistic schools of thought such as [[stoicism]] in contrast to [[foolishness]] which was more addressed by the classical scholars such as [[Aristotle]] and [[plato]].

Such plagues are more collectivistic in nature and building a participatory society helps more with overcoming them, in contrast to plagues of foolishness which are more about rationality and require more specific implementations of [[Firmlaw]] to overcome.

[[Domicide]] disrupts the agent arena relationship<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6i8FFH7Wslc</ref>

== Domicide as a crime ==
Unlike the other triads, Domicide is very easily able to be imposed by an external agent, this is a crime and [[Prohibited]].

== Component plagues ==
αα [[Alienation]]

αλ [[Angst]]

αω [[Absurdity]]
== Trivia ==

* All the plagues of Domicide begin with an A

== See Also ==

* [[Foolishness]]
* [[Enstuckment]]

== References ==
[[Category:Domicide]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Domicide]][[Category:Triads]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[sn:Domicide]]
[[Category:Pages]]
